title: Upon Electra's Tears.
content:
Upon her cheeks she wept, and from those showers
    Sprang up a sweet nativity of flowers.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon Electra's Tears.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
